info.name: Upload with Google Vision
info.description: Image upload and analysis via Google Cloud Vision API.

request.description: Returns API name and running status.

response.name: 200 OK

formdata.description: Image file to analyze (JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF, BMP). Max 10 MB.

request.description:
Upload an image and receive a full Google Vision analysis.

**Body (form-data)**
- `image` (File, required) — the image to analyze. Supported types: jpg, jpeg, png, gif, bmp, webp. Max 10 MB.

**Response fields**
- `filename` — original file name
- `analysis.labels` — Vision label descriptions (lowercase)
- `analysis.text` — detected text (if any), collapsed to one line
- `analysis.isHuman` — true if a person / face was detected
- `analysis.hasLogo` — detected logo names, comma-separated (or null)
- `analysis.safeSearch` — per-category likelihood from Vision (very_unlikely … very_likely)
- `analysis.safeSearchClassification` — `good` / `need_approval` / `alert`
- `analysis.matchedCategories` — `{ "CategoryName": ["matched", "keywords"] }` for every category that matched
- `analysis.categories` — just the matched category names
- `raw` — unmodified Google Vision response

response.name: 200 – verified (guitar)
400 – no file provided
400 – unsupported file type
